dialogos.texto_en: (This room is really spacious.\n It's so big that it's unsettling.)
(A hotel is just a place to stay, right?\n Is it necessary to make the room this big?)
(If it was just me, I'd be fine with a smaller room.\n What am I supposed to do to pass the time?\n Study, I guess?)
(Hm? Who is it?)
Yes?
Hey, it's me.
I-Ichika?!\nWhat are you coming here for?
Do I need a reason to come to your room,\nFutaro-kun?\nWe're dating, after all.
Uh, I guess you're right.\nWell then...
Teehee, are you blushing, honey?
Cut it out, that kinda stuff.\nIt makes me uncomfortable.
Nah, that was a good reaction.\nI just wanna see it over and over again.
E-enough!\nHurry up and come on in!
Okay, thanks for having me.
Well, just make yourself comfortable.\nI'm not using that bed over there,\nso you can use it as a chair or something.
Thanks.\nThen I will.
Even though you to told me to relax,\nyou don't seem very relaxed yourself,\ndo you, Futaro-kun?
This room is too spacious for just me.\nHonestly, I don't know what to do with all this space.
Oh, I see.\nYou're thinking of studying or something, aren't you?
Ahaha!\nYou never waver, no matter what.
But, I didn't really think\nyou'd bring any study materials with you.\nDid you really?
Well, I only brought a little bit with me.
You DID, even if just a little?!
No way, no studying allowed!\nThis is a graduation trip!
When you're bored,\nI'll always be here to keep you company.
Come on, sit next to me.
Okay.
So, um... What should we do?
Wh-what do you mean, what...?
N-nothing! Forget it!\nYou didn't hear anything!
O-okay.
Ahaha...
(We're alone in the room, sitting next to each other.\n This could be a great chance, right?)
(No, no!\n It's too early to do something like that\n on the first night. I'll seem too pushy!)
(If I mess up now and make things awkward,\n how will I spend the rest of the trip?!)
(There must be a better time for this.\n Haste makes waste.\n Let's continue talking and see how it goes.)
B-by the way...\ndid Nino say anything to you\nwhen we were on our way here?
Why do you ask?
Well, I mean... Even though everybody knows\nthat we're together, it still might bother her\na little, don't you think?
You worry too much, Futaro-kun.\nIt's fine, really.
You understand well\nthat everyone supports us dating,\ndon't you?
Of course.
I thought so.
When we first started dating,\nwe went through a lot of things,\nbut that's why we're here now, because we overcame them.
Yeah.
So, enough about that!\nActually, there's something I want to ask you.
What is it?
Well, um...
I-I was wondering if,\nyou're so excited about tomorrow\nthat you can't sleep.
That won't be a problem.\nToday was just the trip here,\nbut I'm a bit tired from everything.
Ahaha, I gotcha.
Don't oversleep, Ichika.\nEven if you get kicked by Nino for oversleeping,\nI won't take responsibility.
I'm not that much of a sleepyhead.
Also, it's our trip with you, Futaro-kun.\nIt would be a waste to oversleep or miss anything.
Yeah.\nLet's have some fun.
Yeah.
W-well then!\nYou look sleepy too, Futaro-kun,\nso I think I'll head back now.
Huh? Already?\nIs there something you wanted to ask me about earlier?
Yeah, that's right.\nI thought you might say something like,\n'I can't sleep alone and I'm so lonely!'
If you can't stand being alone,\nyou can come to my room, okay?
If I did that, I'd probably get kicked out\nby Nino, wouldn't I?
Hahaha, that's true.\nWell then, goodnight, Futaro-kun.
Yeah, goodnight.
That conversation... We can talk about it later.
